questions.question: John says do not love the world or anything in the world because the world and its desires are doing what?
questions.feedback: The world and its desires pass away, but whoever does God's will lives forever.

questions.question: John says anyone who denies the Father and the Son is what?
questions.feedback: Whoever denies the Father and the Son is the antichrist.

questions.question: John says it is the last hour and many antichrists have come.
questions.feedback: It is the last hour; as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, many have already come.

questions.question: Jesus Christ is the atoning sacrifice for our sins and for the sins of the whole _____.
questions.feedback: He is the atoning sacrifice not only for our sins but for the sins of the whole world.

questions.question: Anyone who claims to be in the light but hates a brother or sister is still in the _____.
questions.feedback: Anyone who hates a brother or sister is still in the darkness.
